title: Python: Implement TX queue with priority
description:
python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py has no TX queue - sends directly to radio.

Required:
- Add TxQueue class with:
  - 4 packets max capacity
  - 4 priority levels (0=routing, 1=ACK, 2=urgent, 3=bulk)
  - deadline_ms per entry (default: 5s routing, 10s ACK, 60s app)
  - expire_stale() method to drop expired packets before TX
  - preemption when full (evict lowest priority)
  - Explicit backpressure (raise QueueFull error, not silent drop)
- Integrate into LinkLayer.send()
- Add tests in python/tests/link/

See spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md §3 TX Queue for requirements.
